channel.title: supramolecular chemistry; calixarenes; iron; bridging ligands; magneticproperties on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in supramolecular chemistry; calixarenes; iron; bridging ligands; magneticproperties on LMI

item.title: Synthesis, Crystal Structure, And Magnetic Properties Of A Bis-Dinuclearoxo-Bridged Iron(Iii) Complex With P-Sulfonatocalix[4]Arene
